name: Vimeo Enterprise
description: Vimeo Enterprise — enterprise video hosting, live, and OTT platform

seo.title: Vimeo Enterprise — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Vimeo Enterprise: Vimeo Enterprise — enterprise video hosting, live, and OTT platform

when_to_use: Enterprise video hosting with SSO and advanced permissions
Secure internal video distribution for large organizations
Live streaming with registration and audience management
Video communication platform for HR and corporate comms
Brand-safe video hosting with analytics and CRM integrations

pros: Clean, mature video hosting with strong brand
OTT apps and enterprise video portals
Live events, webinars, and VOD in one
cons: Enterprise pricing starts well into five figures
API reach narrower than Mux or Cloudflare Stream
Less customizable for pure developer use
review.verdict: Approachable enterprise video with good brand trust — but developer APIs trail specialized players.
review.best_for: Mid-market companies wanting unified hosting, live, and OTT without huge ops.
review.not_for: Developers wanting Mux-level API depth and flexibility.
